uplink.description: PIR motion alarm frame: motion detected, count and PIR supply reported
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame; byte0=0x32 selects the legacy 'Produit PIR' frame (upstream getFrameType -> 'Ancien produit' -> frame_type_ancien -> 'Produit PIR'). type_trame=0x08 is the motion-alarm frame (upstream 'Trame alarme') -> action.motion.detected=true. ouverture_boitier=0x01 -> enclosure closed; capteur_dq[1]=bytes[4]=0x00 -> 'Active'; compteur_pir=0x0005=5 -> action.motion.count; temperature_pir=0x0C80=3200 mV -> pirSensorVoltage 3.2 V. Expected confirmed by running reference/upstream-codec.js (compteur_pir.value=5, temperature_pir.value=3200, type_trame='Trame alarme').

uplink.description: PIR periodic count frame: no alarm, cumulative count reported
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame; byte0=0x32 'Produit PIR', type_trame=0x10 periodic count frame (upstream 'Trame de comptage') -> detected=false; compteur_pir=0x0102=258 -> action.motion.count; temperature_pir=0x0C00=3072 mV -> pirSensorVoltage 3.072 V. Expected confirmed by running reference/upstream-codec.js (compteur_pir.value=258, temperature_pir.value=3072, type_trame='Trame de comptage').

uplink.description: PIR enclosure-open event: enclosure opened, no motion
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame; byte0=0x32 'Produit PIR', type_trame=0x01 enclosure-open event (upstream 'Trame d'ourture boitier') -> detected=false; ouverture_boitier=0x00 -> enclosure open; compteur_pir=0x0000=0. Expected confirmed by running reference/upstream-codec.js (ouverture_boitier='boitier ouvert', compteur_pir.value=0).

Synthetic in-bounds frame; byte0=0x01 selects the legacy keep-alive frame (upstream getFrameType -> 'Ancien produit' -> frame_type_ancien -> 'Trame de vie') carrying tensionc=0x0C80=3200 mV -> battery 3.2 V. Expected confirmed by running reference/upstream-codec.js (tensionc.value=3.2).

uplink.description: device error frame yields an error
uplink._note: Synthetic frame; byte0=0x8E has high bit set (new-product) and byte1=0x8E has low nibble 0xE, which upstream getFrameType classifies as 'Trame d'erreur'. byte2=0x8A is ERR_BATTERY_LEVEL_DEAD. The frame carries no measurement, so we surface it as a decode error rather than data.
